## Research contribution

### What changed?

### Research question and experiment IDs

### Epistemic status

- [ ] Facts are separated from interpretations.
- [ ] Hypotheses are testable and labeled.
- [ ] Conclusions state scope, confidence, and limitations.

### Evidence and reproducibility

- [ ] Every observation links to evidence.
- [ ] Raw evidence is preserved and has provenance.
- [ ] Variables, procedure, environment, and deviations are documented.
- [ ] Conflicting or negative evidence is included.

### Safety and rights

- [ ] Sensitive information has been removed or redacted transparently.
- [ ] Included material can be redistributed.
- [ ] No secrets or private data are committed.

### Reviewer notes
